title: Unsupported: The package name is the same as the variable name defined in enum type of the other package

features.name: package name conflicts with enum value name from another package
features.description: Code should include a package whose name is identical to an enum value defined in a different package
features.snippet:
package pkg; typedef enum { A = 10, B = 20, C = 30 } en_t; endpackage
package C; parameter one = 1; endpackage

features.name: cross_package_enum_access_with_conflicting_name
features.description: Code should include accessing an enum value from a package using :: operator when another package has the same name as the enum value
